conversationHistory.content: People are engaging with that. Not going to lie. It's been fine.

Okay okay, I see you being coy — but that's actually huge, Saif. People engaging means the content's landing.

So what else is going on? What do you want to talk about?
I'm working on it, don't scare me like that.

Alright, my bad — I'm not trying to scare you, just keep you honest.

What's the move then? What do you need right now?
I I I want to I'm I'm I'm I'm I I got done with the project. I'm about to post it.

Good. Post it now — don't overthink it.

What's next after that?
After this, it's a school.
School for what? And when are you starting?
I'm good, how are you?

I'm here to push you forward, brother. Not to chat.

You just said school — what school, when does it start?
I I never said anything about school.

You said "After this, it's a school." Two minutes ago.

Stop dodging. What did you mean?
Call.
I'm listening. Talk.
Yes, so we just made a voice agent, that's kind of like heavy voice. I was thinking about posting it.

Good. Post it today.

What else did you finish?
You tell me what should I do?

No. I ask the questions. You answer them.

What did you accomplish today besides the voice agent?
Talk to you.

That's not work, Saif.

Did you apply to jobs? Did you code? Did you post content?
